overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Spider-Man video game showing the character walking through a city at night. The scene transitions from an urban street lined with parked cars and apartment buildings into a park area with statues and autumn trees, ending with the character looking up at a skyscraper.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban residential street with parked vehicles

events.description: passing alongside a large white delivery truck that temporarily dominates the right side of the frame
approaching and entering a crosswalk at the intersection

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man walks steadily down the city street between rows of parked cars and apartment buildings

notable_agents.action: white delivery truck moving slowly ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: tall brick residential buildings with illuminated windows lining the street
continuous line of parked sedans and vehicles along the right curb
tall metal street lamp casting warm light on the pavement
trees with autumn-colored foliage separating the street from the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man walks down a dimly lit urban street at night, flanked by brick apartment buildings and rows of parked cars. The camera follows from behind as he approaches and passes a slow-moving white delivery truck, continuing toward an intersection crosswalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban park pedestrian entrance and pathway

events.description: crossing from asphalt street onto brick-paved park walkway, entering green space
slight directional adjustment to navigate around pedestrians crossing the path

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man crosses into the park area, moving from the street onto pedestrian pathways while avoiding other people

notable_agents.action: woman carrying an orange bag walking across the path
man in dark coat and hat standing near the crosswalk entrance

entered.detail: ornate black cast-iron park lamps with warm glowing light
wooden park benches situated along the tree line
large dark bronze statue of a historical figure on a stone pedestal becoming visible ahead

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions from urban street to park as Spider-Man crosses onto brick pathways surrounded by trees and pedestrians. Park lamps illuminate the walkways while a large statue becomes visible in the distance, and the character navigates through scattered pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: park interior with monuments and statue garden

events.description: passing by the large dark statue on pedestal, revealing more of the park interior
character stops walking and tilts head upward to look at the tall skyscraper

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man walks through the park, circles around a prominent statue, and stops to gaze up at a towering skyscraper

notable_agents.action: man in dark suit walking past the statue area

entered.detail: tall modern skyscraper with illuminated windows rising above the tree canopy
white classical-style marble statue on a pedestal visible in the background
green metal park trash receptacles along the pathway

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man continues through the park interior, passing close to a prominent dark statue on a stone pedestal. The environment features scattered pedestrians, benches, and autumn trees. As he progresses, a white marble statue and eventually a towering glass skyscraper come into view, with the character stopping to look up at the building against the night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a dimly lit urban street into a serene city park and finally toward a towering skyscraper. It begins behind Spider-Man as he walks past brick apartment buildings and rows of parked cars, passing a slow-moving white delivery truck on his way toward an intersection. As he crosses the street, the environment shifts from asphalt to brick pathways illuminated by park lamps, where the camera follows him through a crowd of pedestrians. The scene then opens further into the park interior, gliding past autumn trees and a dark statue on a stone pedestal before revealing a white marble monument. Finally, the camera comes to a halt as Spider-Man stops to look up at a massive glass skyscraper piercing the night sky.
